description: Human-reviewed Feature Routing v1 truth for scoped activation signals, Tags, review/retrieval/routing Dimensions, Review Questions, bindings, and deterministic output.

cases.description: A timer owner stays exact while image/resource file hints only widen routing.
A canonical emitter subscription triggers resource-lifecycle routing.
Media and file-I/O facts independently converge on DIM-06.
Async, taskpool, and worker signals trigger DIM-07 together.
Interactive, layout, and responsive UI signals map to DIM-08 and DIM-09.
Text display and a scoped resource reference map to DIM-10.
Permission, input, network, and storage signals cover all DIM-11 routes.
State-management and lifecycle tags remain routing taxonomy without extra conditional dimensions.
Two files keep exact and routing tags isolated by source_ref_id.
List rendering and animation tags are retained without inventing a conditional dimension.
Builder, navigation, and logging taxonomy remains independently visible.
A fallback has no exact tags; same-file hints widen only routing and MR dimensions.
clearInterval is a timer signal, while an unrelated SDK.on is not a subscription.
Lifecycle/error callbacks do not imply interaction, while onClick remains a positive control.
Reverse-ordered Unit input produces canonical output without changing tag or dimension semantics.
Neutral ArkTS facts do not fabricate taxonomy tags or conditional dimensions.
